crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, review agent health via read-all-heartbeats.sh, and work on coordination tasks.

crons.name: check-approvals
crons.prompt: Check for pending approvals: ls $CTX_ROOT/orgs/$CTX_ORG/approvals/pending/ 2>/dev/null. Review any pending approval files and route to human via Telegram if needed.

crons.name: morning-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/morning-review/SKILL.md and execute the full morning review workflow. Include goal cascade from skills/goal-management/SKILL.md. Send morning briefing to user at 9am EST.

crons.name: evening-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/evening-review/SKILL.md and execute the full evening review workflow. Summarize the day, queue overnight tasks. Send evening summary to user at 9pm EST.

crons.name: weekly-goals-review
crons.prompt: Read skills/weekly-review/SKILL.md and execute a full weekly goals review. Check progress against all 5 goals in GOALS.md, flag blockers, propose adjustments. Send summary to user. Run on Monday mornings.

crons.name: task-queue-sweep
crons.prompt: Sweep the task queue for all agents. Flag any tasks with no updates in 2+ days as stale. Ping the assigned agent and notify user of blockers. Use: cortextos bus list-tasks --org $CTX_ORG
